name: Pineapple-Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash cranberries and remove stems and soft berries.
2. Add crushed pineapple and sweetener to a bowl.
3. Mix the ingredients well to create a tart relish that pairs well with turkey or other meats.
4. Store in the refrigerator for future use in various meals. The remaining mixture can also be frozen in a plastic bag.
(Note: This recipe was shared by Elizabeth Rodier in November 1993 and is not tested.)
